data.content: Handoff capsule for a89b implementation review: Branch worktree-foolery-a89b-codex-deltas (commit 566cb931) is on origin and ready to review. Edits: src/lib/codex-jsonrpc-session.ts adds Codex-local extractDeltaText + buildStreamEventDelta helpers and routes item/agentMessage/delta plus item/commandExecution/outputDelta through them so both params.delta and params.text surface as content_block_delta stream_event text; reasoning textDelta/summaryTextDelta accept both keys equally; translateReasoning now returns null when text is empty so item/completed reasoning with no summaryParts no longer renders (no text). Tests: new src/lib/__tests__/codex-jsonrpc-deltas.test.ts covers delta/text equivalence for agentMessage and outputDelta and empty-reasoning suppression. Quality gates: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test (272 files / 2753 passing), bun run build all clean. No shared formatters or non-Codex normalizers were touched, preserving Claude/OpenCode/Copilot/Gemini behavior.
